modules.name: renoir.debug
documentation:
renoir.debug
------------

Provides debugging utilities.

:copyright: 2014 Giovanni Barillari

Quite a lot of magic comes from Flask (http://flask.pocoo.org)
:copyright: (c) 2014 by Armin Ronacher.

:license: BSD-3-Clause
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: renoir.debug.translate_syntax_error
documentation: Rewrites a syntax error to please traceback systems.

functions.name: renoir.debug.translate_exception
documentation:
If passed an exc_info it will automatically rewrite the exceptions
all the way down to the correct line numbers and frames.

functions.name: renoir.debug.fake_exc_info
documentation: Helper for `translate_exception`.

functions.name: renoir.debug._init_ugly_crap
documentation:
This function implements a few ugly things so that we can patch the
traceback objects.  The function returned allows resetting `tb_next` on
any python traceback object.  Do not attempt to use this on non cpython
interpreters

classes.name: renoir.debug.TracebackFrameProxy
documentation: Proxies a traceback frame.

classes.name: renoir.debug.ProcessedTraceback

methods.name: renoir.debug.ProcessedTraceback.render_as_text
documentation: Return a string with the traceback.

methods.name: renoir.debug.ProcessedTraceback.exc_info
documentation: Exception info tuple with a proxy around the frame objects.

methods.name: renoir.debug.ProcessedTraceback.standard_exc_info
documentation: Standard python exc_info for re-raising
Holds a renoir preprocessed traceback for printing or reraising.
